## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change scoped to the requested behavior.
- [ ] I did not directly edit real `~/.agents/skills/<cmd>/db`, team state, or user config files.
- [ ] I added or updated focused BATS coverage for changed script behavior, where practical.
- [ ] I ran `bash -n scripts/*.sh install.sh setup.sh uninstall.sh` for changed shell scripts.
- [ ] I ran `bats tests/` or documented why it was not applicable.
- [ ] I updated `README.md`, `docs/design.md`, `SKILL.md`, or command templates when behavior changed.
- [ ] I kept `AGENTS.md` and `CLAUDE.md` synchronized except for approved mechanical substitutions.
- [ ] I did not perform operations that affect the upstream repository.
